hero_subtitle: SFTY connects and organizes multi-provider KYC outputs into structured workflows that preserve audit trails and evidence for efficient VASP compliance reviews.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Kyc audit trails weaken across disconnected providers
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to preserve clear evidence when KYC outputs remain isolated across multiple providers. This fragmentation slows review workflows and complicates audit readiness by breaking the link between checks, decisions and supporting documentation.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects KYC provider outputs, reviewer actions and decision records into one structured workflow that maintains an unbroken audit trail for compliance teams managing KYC reviews and regulatory inspections.
workflow_title: From KYC provider checks to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY captures and links KYC provider outputs through review, case creation, decision logging and evidence preservation to support defensible audit trails.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY transforms dispersed KYC provider checks into structured workflows, decision logs and preserved evidence, delivering clear audit trails without replacing existing providers.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with a provider-neutral layer that preserves KYC evidence, enforces case governance and prepares audit-ready records for bank due diligence and controlled deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP compliance teams a connected layer to connect KYC providers, structure reviews, manage cases and preserve evidence for clearer audit trails and scalable operations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY orchestrate multiple KYC providers?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates and normalizes KYC provider outputs, applies internal rules, routes reviews and links results into cases without requiring provider changes or disrupting existing workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case histories and evidence packages for each KYC check, enabling compliance teams to defend audit and regulatory inspections with traceable records.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule providers, integrating their outputs into one compliance operating workflow without replacing your current stack.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC and compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY acts as a neutral compliance layer that connects and structures provider outputs without replacing KYC, KYB, KYT or other compliance service providers.
final_title: Preserve audit evidence for KYC provider outputs
final_description: Review how SFTY connects multi-provider KYC results into structured workflows with audit trails and case evidence for VASP operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
